name: Orange Creamsical Dessert
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (3 1/2 ounces) instant vanilla pudding/pie filling
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, dissolve gelatin in boiling water; stir in cold water.
2. Chill until slightly thickened.
3. Prepare pudding according to package directions using milk. Reserve 5 mandarin oranges for garnish.
4. Fold remaining mandarin oranges, thickened gelatin, and 1 cup whipped topping into prepared pudding.
5. Pour mixture into a 6-cup ring mold. Chill 4 hours or until set.
6. To serve, unmold onto serving plate. Spoon remaining whipped topping in the center of the ring.
7. Garnish with reserved mandarin oranges and lime peel. Cut into leaf shapes.
